overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City. The player traverses a covered commercial walkway with orange textured pavement and digital billboards, crosses an urban intersection, and continues along a palm-tree-lined pedestrian promenade with benches and neon storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with overhead digital advertising

events.description: approaching the open intersection as building cover recedes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath building overhangs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: distinctive orange grid-patterned pedestrian walkway surface
cluster of large suspended digital advertising screens displaying various content
illuminated storefront signage for Solo Jewelers with white neon lettering
black metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street
cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered commercial walkway with distinctive orange textured pavement. The camera moves forward beneath building overhangs, passing digital billboards suspended overhead and a neon sign for Solo Jewelers. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction along the sheltered path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic control

events.description: waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in purple jacket crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals showing green
tall multi-sided digital billboard tower with rotating advertisements
raised concrete planter with palm trees on the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open urban intersection with a wide crosswalk. The camera waits for traffic then crosses the street, passing a red sports car and moving toward a tall digital advertising tower. The environment shifts from sheltered to exposed, with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with palm trees and seating areas

events.description: passing groups of seated pedestrians resting on benches along the path
slight navigation around pedestrians while maintaining forward progress

agents.ego_description: walking along the tree-lined promenade, passing people seated on benches and observing the neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a concrete bench conversing
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: dark concrete sidewalk with distinctive painted yellow rectangular sections
tall palm trees in continuous planters lining the right side of the path
public seating benches occupied by resting pedestrians
scattered newspapers and debris on the walkway surface
illuminated business signs and storefront lighting along the building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a pedestrian promenade lined with palm trees and concrete benches. The ground features dark concrete with yellow painted sections. The camera passes seated NPCs and scattered newspaper litter while moving beneath an overhead transit structure. Neon storefront signs illuminate the right side as the path continues into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial corridor into an open urban intersection and finally along a neon-lit promenade. It begins beneath building overhangs on a covered walkway with orange textured pavement, passing suspended digital billboards and a neon sign for Solo Jewelers. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from this sheltered path to an exposed urban intersection, where it crosses a wide street past a red sports car and toward a tall advertising tower. The scene then opens into a pedestrian promenade lined with palm trees and concrete benches, moving across dark concrete with yellow accents. Finally, the camera glides beneath an overhead transit structure, passing seated pedestrians and newspaper litter while neon storefronts illuminate the path ahead.
